page_meta.title: Voting Agreement
page_meta.description: Review and agree to voting terms and conditions before proceeding

terms_and_conditions.section_subtitle: Please read and accept to continue
terms_and_conditions.intro_text: By clicking the button below, you agree to the following conditions:
terms_and_conditions.heading: Electronic Voting Agreement
terms_and_conditions.condition_1: Your vote is anonymous and encrypted
terms_and_conditions.condition_2: You must complete voting within {minutes} minutes
terms_and_conditions.condition_3: Do not share your voting codes
terms_and_conditions.condition_4: Only one vote per voter is allowed
items: Your vote is secret and will be recorded securely
You will complete the voting process within the time limit
You will not share your voting codes with anyone
You agree to the electronic voting process and its rules

agreement_required.title: Agreement Required
agreement_required.checkbox_label: I agree to all terms and conditions
agreement_required.aria_label: Check this box to agree to all voting terms and conditions. This must be checked before you can start voting.

submit_button.help_text: By clicking, you confirm your agreement to all terms
submit_button.aria_label_enabled: Start voting now - you have agreed to all terms
submit_button.aria_label_disabled: Please agree to the terms and conditions first before starting

voting_time_info.label: Important
voting_time_info.title: Time Limit Notice
voting_time_info.message: You have {minutes} minutes to complete your voting once you start.

errors.ip_mismatch_help: Your IP address has changed. This is for security purposes.
errors.agreement_required: You must agree to the terms and conditions to proceed

accessibility.page_loaded: Voting agreement page loaded. Please read and accept the terms to proceed.
accessibility.terms_announcement: Voting agreement terms. Select a language to view the full agreement.
accessibility.checkbox_checked: Agreement checked. You can now proceed to vote.
accessibility.checkbox_unchecked: Agreement not checked. Please review and accept the terms to continue.
